metadata.title: All Products - CKY Audio
metadata.description: Explore all CKY audio products including soundbar systems, portable party speakers, and vinyl turntables

pageTitle.title: All Products
pageTitle.description: Explore CKY's complete range of innovative audio products

products.name: SRA5088G Dolby Atmos Soundbar
products.description: 5.1.2 channel Dolby Atmos soundbar system, equipped with wireless satellite speakers and powerful subwoofer, 195W surging power output, creating a true home theater-level audio experience.
products.detailDescription: 5.1.2 channel Dolby Atmos soundbar system with wireless satellite speakers and powerful subwoofer, supports HDMI ARC, optical, Bluetooth and other connection methods, 195W powerful output, creating true home theater-grade audio experience.

metadata.title: SRA5088G Dolby Atmos Soundbar System - CKY Audio
metadata.description: SRA5088G 5.1.2 Channel Dolby Atmos Soundbar System with wireless satellite speakers and subwoofer for cinema-grade immersive audio

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The SRA5088G is a premium home theater audio system crafted for users pursuing ultimate sound quality. Featuring advanced 5.1.2 channel configuration with perfect Dolby Atmos technology support, it delivers true three-dimensional stereo sound, surrounding you with sound from all directions, creating an immersive listening experience.

This system consists of a main soundbar, wireless satellite speakers, and a high-power subwoofer. The main soundbar integrates three high-performance speaker units and a digital amplification system, combined with DSP digital signal processing technology, ensuring every sound detail is clearly presented.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The SRA5088G integrates industry-leading audio technology and user-friendly design, with every aspect meticulously refined from hardware to software optimization.

items.title: Dolby Atmos Technology
items.description: Supports Dolby Atmos audio format with 5.1.2 channel configuration for true three-dimensional sound field. Height channel design allows sound from overhead, creating a more realistic sound environment.

items.title: Wireless Satellite Speakers
items.description: Innovative wireless satellite speaker design with built-in high-capacity 7.4V/2600mAh lithium batteries, providing hours of continuous use on a single charge. Stable wireless transmission technology ensures zero-latency, zero-distortion audio signals.

items.title: Multiple Connectivity Options
items.description: Features HDMI ARC, optical, USB, Bluetooth 5.0, 3.5mm AUX interfaces, compatible with various audio sources. Supports USB storage devices up to 32GB for direct local music playback.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The SRA5088G uses high-quality audio components and advanced digital processing technology, ensuring every technical parameter meets professional standards for high-fidelity sound.

products.name: BT408 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: BT408 portable Bluetooth speaker featuring Bluetooth 5.4 technology with 40W powerful output. IPX4 waterproof rating, supports TWS pairing, USB/TF card playback, hands-free calling and more.
products.detailDescription: BT408 portable Bluetooth speaker featuring Bluetooth 5.4 technology with 40W powerful output. Built-in 7.4V/3000mAh high-capacity battery supports USB-C fast charging. IPX4 waterproof rating, supports TWS pairing, ideal choice for outdoor activities and daily listening.

metadata.title: BT408 Portable Bluetooth Speaker - CKY Audio
metadata.description: BT408 portable Bluetooth speaker, 40W powerful output, Bluetooth 5.4, IPX4 waterproof, supports TWS pairing

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The BT408 is a Bluetooth speaker designed for users pursuing portability and sound quality. Featuring the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology for more stable connection, longer transmission distance, and lower power consumption. Dual 20W stereo speaker configuration with total power reaching 40W delivers full and pleasant sound quality performance.

Built-in 7.4V/3000mAh high-capacity rechargeable battery combined with USB-C fast charging port for more convenient charging and longer battery life. IPX4 waterproof design resists rain and sweat, suitable for outdoor use.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The BT408 perfectly combines advanced technology with portable design, bringing you high-quality music experience anytime, anywhere.

items.title: Bluetooth 5.4 Technology
items.description: Featuring the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology, compared to previous versions, faster connection speed, stronger stability, and longer transmission distance. Low power design extends battery life while ensuring high-quality audio transmission.

items.title: IPX4 Waterproof Design
items.description: Certified with IPX4 waterproof rating, effectively protects against water splashes from all directions. Whether outdoor picnics, beach parties or bathroom use, no need to worry about water droplets and sweat erosion.

items.title: Multi-Function Entertainment
items.description: Supports Bluetooth, USB/TF card, AUX and other audio input methods. TWS True Wireless Stereo technology can pair two BT408 units for more stunning stereo effect. Built-in hands-free calling function.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The BT408 uses high-quality audio components and high-efficiency battery system, ensuring excellent sound quality performance and long-lasting battery life.

products.name: TT101 Turntable Player
products.description: Classic turntable player equipped with external speaker system, 50W power output. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection, RCA output, Phono/Line switching and more, a perfect fusion of vintage appearance and modern technology.
products.detailDescription: Classic turntable player equipped with external speaker system, 50W power output. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection, RCA output, Phono/Line switching, 3.5mm AUX input and more, perfect fusion of vintage and modern.

metadata.title: TT101 Turntable Player - CKY Audio
metadata.description: TT101 classic turntable player with external speakers, Bluetooth 5.4, vintage design meets modern technology

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The TT101 is a turntable player that perfectly combines vintage aesthetics with modern technology. Featuring classic belt-drive mechanism and high-quality stylus for accurate vinyl record playback. Equipped with external passive speaker system with 50W total power output, delivers warm and pleasant sound quality.

Built with premium MDF wooden cabinet design, not only provides stable platform but also adds vintage charm. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection for easy pairing with modern devices. RCA output and Phono/Line switching accommodate various usage scenarios.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The TT101 brings together classic turntable craftsmanship with modern convenience features, offering authentic vinyl experience for audiophiles.

items.title: Authentic Vinyl Experience
items.description: Belt-drive mechanism with precision-balanced platter ensures stable playback speed. High-quality diamond stylus accurately tracks record grooves, reproducing warm analog sound that digital cannot match.

items.title: Premium Build Quality
items.description: MDF wooden cabinet provides solid foundation reducing vibration and resonance. External passive speakers with dedicated amplification deliver 50W clear, warm sound with excellent frequency response.

items.title: Modern Connectivity
items.description: Bluetooth 5.4 enables wireless streaming from smartphones and tablets. RCA output connects to external amplifiers. Phono/Line switch accommodates different input requirements. 3.5mm AUX input adds versatility.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The TT101 combines traditional turntable components with modern features, ensuring both authentic vinyl playback and contemporary convenience.

products.name: PT91219 Dual 12" Party Speaker
products.description: Professional-grade party speaker with dual 12-inch drivers, 150W powerful output. Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection and more, the preferred equipment for large events and professional performances.
products.detailDescription: Professional-grade party speaker with dual 12-inch drivers, 150W powerful output. Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection, guitar/microphone interfaces, ideal for large events and professional performances.

metadata.title: PT91219 Dual 12" Party Speaker - CKY Audio
metadata.description: Professional party speaker with dual 12-inch drivers, 150W output, TWS pairing, perfect for large events
metadata.keywords: party speaker,professional speaker,portable PA,12 inch speaker,event audio

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The PT91219 is a professional-grade portable party speaker designed for large gatherings, outdoor events, and professional performances. Featuring dual 12-inch high-power woofers combined with compression horn tweeters, total output power reaches 150W, delivering powerful bass and clear treble.

Supports multiple audio input methods including Bluetooth wireless connection, USB/TF card playback, FM radio, and 3.5mm AUX input. Equipped with guitar and microphone inputs with independent volume control, suitable for live performances and karaoke. TWS interconnection allows two units to create a more powerful stereo system.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The PT91219 combines professional-grade power with versatile features, making it the ideal choice for events requiring high-volume, high-quality sound.

items.title: Powerful Audio Performance
items.description: Dual 12-inch woofers deliver deep, powerful bass that can fill large spaces. Compression horn tweeters ensure clear high-frequency reproduction. 150W total power output provides sufficient volume for outdoor events and large venues.

items.title: Professional Connectivity
items.description: Equipped with guitar and microphone inputs with independent volume and echo control. Perfect for live performances, speeches, and karaoke. Supports simultaneous use of multiple input sources for maximum flexibility.

items.title: Versatile Entertainment
items.description: Multiple playback options including Bluetooth, USB/TF card, FM radio, and AUX input. TWS technology allows pairing two speakers for true stereo sound. LED lighting effects add atmosphere to parties and events.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The PT91219 is built with professional-grade components designed for reliable performance in demanding event environments.

products.name: TT102 All-in-One Turntable
products.description: All-in-one turntable player, 25W power output, built-in tweeter and woofer units. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection, RCA output, Phono/Line switching, 3.5mm AUX input and more, compact design saves space.
products.detailDescription: Integrated vinyl turntable with 25W power output and built-in tweeter and woofer units. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection, RCA output, Phono/Line switching, 3.5mm AUX input and other versatile functions. MDF wooden cabinet design with compact integrated structure, perfect fusion of vintage aesthetics and modern technology.

metadata.title: Product Details - TT102 Vinyl Turntable
metadata.description: TT102 integrated vinyl turntable, 25W power output, Bluetooth 5.4 support, compact design, perfect blend of vintage and modern

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The TT102 is an integrated vinyl turntable that perfectly blends vintage aesthetics with modern technology. Featuring classic turntable design with high-quality stylus and tonearm system, ensuring perfect reproduction of vinyl record sound quality. The MDF wooden cabinet not only enhances product texture but also effectively reduces resonance, delivering purer sound quality.

The integrated design incorporates speakers within the turntable cabinet, equipped with 3.81cm tweeter units×2 and 5.71cm woofer units×2. The crossover design ensures clear presentation of high and low frequencies, with 25W power output providing full-bodied sound performance. Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection for playing music from smartphones, tablets and other devices through the turntable. Features L&R(RCA) output interface, Phono/Line switching function, 3.5mm AUX input and other versatile interfaces for connecting external audio systems or inputting other audio sources. LED indicators intuitively display operating status, and 12V/2A DC adapter power supply ensures stable operation. Compact integrated design saves space and suits various home environments.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The TT102 perfectly combines vintage sentiment with modern technology. The integrated design saves space while enjoying the warm sound quality of vinyl records and convenient features of modern audio.

items.title: Integrated Compact Design
items.description: The speaker system is built into the turntable cabinet. The integrated design saves space and suits various home environments. The MDF wooden cabinet paired with exquisite turntable design interprets vintage aesthetics perfectly. Not just an audio device, but also an exquisite work of art.

items.title: Crossover Speaker System
items.description: Built-in 3.81cm tweeter units×2 and 5.71cm woofer units×2 with crossover design ensuring clear presentation of high and low frequencies. 25W power output delivers full-bodied sound performance, enjoying both the warm sound quality of vinyl records and clear details of modern music.

items.title: Multi-Function Connectivity
items.description: Supports Bluetooth 5.4 wireless connection for playing music from smartphones, tablets and other devices. Features Phono/Line switching, RCA output, 3.5mm AUX input and other versatile interfaces for connecting external audio systems to achieve more professional sound quality, or inputting other audio sources for playback. LED indicators intuitively display operating status.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The TT102 uses high-quality audio components and stable turntable system. The integrated design saves space while ensuring perfect reproduction of vinyl record sound quality.

products.name: PT91019 Dual 10" Party Speaker
products.description: Professional party speaker with dual 10-inch drivers, 150W powerful output. Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection, guitar/mic input, ideal for large gatherings and professional performances.
products.detailDescription: Professional party speaker with dual 10-inch drivers, 150W powerful output. Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection and more. Features USB 2.0A charging port, guitar input, and microphone input. Supports AC110V/220V power supply, suitable for various large gatherings and performance scenarios.

metadata.title: Product Details - PT91019 Portable Party Speaker
metadata.description: PT91019 Dual 10-inch Portable Party Speaker, 150W power output, supports Bluetooth/USB/FM radio, features USB charging port
metadata.keywords: portable speaker,party speaker,bluetooth speaker,outdoor speaker,dual 10 inch

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The PT91019 is a professional party speaker designed for large gatherings and professional performances. Dual 10-inch large-diameter speaker configuration with 150W powerful output provides more impressive audio performance and greater sound pressure level than the 8-inch version, suitable for outdoor large parties, commercial events, small concerts, and other scenarios.

Supports AC110V/220V (50/60Hz) power supply, ensuring long-term stable operation. Supports Bluetooth wireless connection, USB playback (up to 32GB), FM radio, and other audio input methods. TWS True Wireless Stereo technology can interconnect two speakers to create a more powerful stereo system. Equipped with USB 2.0A charging port for charging mobile devices. Guitar input and microphone input (supports wired/wireless microphones) make this speaker a multi-functional entertainment center. LED display and remote control make operation more convenient.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The PT91019 focuses on professional audio quality and powerful performance, making it the perfect choice for large events and professional performances.

items.title: Professional-Grade Audio
items.description: Dual 10-inch large-diameter speaker configuration with 150W powerful output provides greater sound pressure level and more impressive audio performance than the 8-inch version. Whether outdoor large parties or commercial events, it can easily cover the entire venue, delivering professional-grade audio quality.

items.title: Stable Power System
items.description: Supports AC110V/220V (50/60Hz) power supply, ensuring long-term stable operation. Equipped with USB 2.0A charging port for charging mobile devices, maintaining sufficient device power even during outdoor use.

items.title: All-in-One Entertainment Center
items.description: Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection, and more. Features guitar input and microphone input, supports wired/wireless microphones (optional), suitable for karaoke, performances, DJ shows, and various entertainment scenarios. LED display and remote control make operation more convenient.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The PT91019 uses professional-grade audio components and stable power supply system to ensure long-term high-quality operation and excellent sound performance.

products.description: 2.1 channel soundbar system with wireless subwoofer, 120W power output, metal grille with glossy finish, delivering elegant appearance and excellent sound quality.
products.detailDescription: 2.1 channel soundbar system with wireless subwoofer, supports HDMI ARC, optical, Bluetooth and other connection methods, 120W powerful output, metal grille with glossy finish, delivering elegant appearance and excellent sound quality.

metadata.title: Product Details - SR200G-37-160 Soundbar System
metadata.description: SR200G-37-160 2.1 Channel Soundbar System with wireless subwoofer, 120W power output, metal grille design

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The SR200G-37-160 features exquisite metal grille with glossy finish, not only enhancing sound quality but also adding premium texture to home environments. 2.1 channel configuration with 16.51cm large subwoofer unit delivers rich low-frequency performance and clear mid-high frequency details.

This system features a 60W subwoofer and 60W soundbar, with total power of 120W, sufficient for most home theater and music appreciation needs. Wireless subwoofer design allows flexible layout without complex cable connections. Supports HDMI ARC, optical, Bluetooth, USB, and 3.5mm AUX connection methods, LED indicator intuitively shows working status, equipped with remote control for convenient operation.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The SR200G-37-160 integrates premium audio technology with fashionable design, providing you with superior sound performance and user experience.

items.title: Premium Design Aesthetics
items.description: Metal grille with glossy finish not only enhances product texture but also improves sound propagation. Elegant design perfectly integrates into modern home environments, serving as both audio equipment and art piece.

items.title: Powerful Audio Performance
items.description: 16.51cm large subwoofer unit delivers deep and powerful low-frequency performance, while two 5.89cm soundbar units ensure clear mid-high frequency details. 120W total power configuration handles both explosive movie scenes and deep bass in music impressively.

items.title: Comprehensive Connectivity
items.description: Features DC JACK, USB, LINE IN, optical, HDMI IN interfaces, compatible with various audio source devices. Wireless Bluetooth connection is simple and fast, easily pairing with smartphones, tablets, and computers. LED indicator intuitively shows working status, remote control for convenient operation.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The SR200G-37-160 uses high-quality audio components to ensure every technical parameter meets professional standards.

products.name: SR322 Bluetooth Soundbar
products.description: 2.2 channel Bluetooth soundbar system with built-in dual subwoofers, 100W power output, metal dark gray with gray metal grille, delivering elegant appearance and excellent sound quality.

metadata.description: SR322 2.2 Channel Bluetooth Soundbar System with built-in dual subwoofers, 100W power output, metal grille design

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The SR322 features an innovative 2.2 channel design with dual subwoofers integrated into the soundbar body, providing impressive low-frequency performance without the need for an external subwoofer. Two 8.89cm subwoofer units paired with two 5.2×7.5cm full-range units deliver balanced and layered sound quality.

Metal dark gray housing with gray metal grille design is both beautiful and durable, perfectly blending into various home environments. 100W power output ensures that both movie dialogue and music details are clearly presented. Supports HDMI ARC, optical, Bluetooth, USB, and 3.5mm AUX connection methods, LED display intuitively shows working status, equipped with remote control for convenient operation. Product dimensions: 960×137×74.5mm, suitable for various TV stands or wall mounting.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The SR322 focuses on all-in-one design and professional sound quality, providing you with a simple and efficient home theater solution.

items.description: Innovative built-in dual subwoofer design integrates two 8.89cm subwoofer units into the soundbar body, providing powerful low-frequency performance without an external subwoofer. Simplifies installation and wiring, saves space, while ensuring excellent bass effects.

items.title: Bluetooth Wireless Connection
items.description: Built-in Bluetooth functionality supports wireless connection to smartphones, tablets, computers, and other devices, allowing you to enjoy wireless music anytime, anywhere. Stable Bluetooth transmission ensures zero latency and zero distortion of audio signals, delivering a smooth listening experience.

products.name: BT508 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: BT508 professional portable Bluetooth speaker featuring Bluetooth 5.4 technology with 80W powerful output. IPX4 waterproof rating, supports TWS pairing, USB/TF card playback, hands-free calling and more, ideal choice for large outdoor activities.
products.detailDescription: BT508 professional portable Bluetooth speaker featuring Bluetooth 5.4 technology with 80W powerful output. Built-in 11.1V/2200mAh high-performance battery supports USB-C fast charging. IPX4 waterproof rating, supports TWS pairing, USB/TF card playback, hands-free calling and multiple functions, ideal choice for large outdoor activities and professional use.

metadata.title: Product Details - BT508 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
metadata.description: BT508 portable Bluetooth speaker, 80W powerful output, Bluetooth 5.4, IPX4 waterproof, supports TWS pairing

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The BT508 is the flagship portable Bluetooth speaker in the BT series, designed for users pursuing ultimate sound quality and powerful output. Featuring the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology ensuring stable connection and efficient transmission. Dual 40W high-power stereo speaker configuration with total power reaching 80W, double the power of BT408, delivers more stunning audio performance, suitable for large outdoor gatherings, commercial events and other scenarios.

Built-in 11.1V/2200mAh high-performance lithium battery combined with high-efficiency amplifier system and USB-C fast charging port ensures long-term stable operation. IPX4 waterproof design resists rain and sweat erosion, suitable for various outdoor environments. Supports TWS True Wireless Stereo pairing, two BT508 units can form a more powerful 160W stereo system. Supports USB/TF card playback, AUX wired input, hands-free calling and multiple functions, built-in EQ sound adjustment to meet different music styles and usage scenarios. Larger body size (482×200×257mm) accommodates larger speaker units for more excellent low-frequency performance and sound field width.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The BT508 focuses on professional sound quality and powerful performance as its core, providing perfect audio solution for large outdoor activities and professional use.

items.title: Powerful Output
items.description: Dual 40W high-power speaker configuration with total power reaching 80W, double the power increase compared to BT408. Larger speaker units and stronger driving power deliver more stunning audio performance, deeper bass, and wider sound field. Whether large outdoor parties, commercial events or professional performances, easily covers larger spaces, filling every corner with beautiful music.

items.title: High-Performance Battery System
items.description: Features 11.1V/2200mAh high-performance lithium battery, although capacity is slightly smaller than BT408, higher voltage combined with high-efficiency amplifier system still provides sufficient battery life. USB-C fast charging port supports higher charging current for faster charging speed. Intelligent power management system optimizes energy consumption and extends playback time.

items.title: Professional-Grade Features
items.description: Bluetooth 5.4 technology ensures stable connection and high-quality audio transmission. TWS True Wireless Stereo technology supports dual-unit pairing for 160W super powerful stereo system. Supports USB/TF card, AUX and other audio inputs, built-in hands-free calling function. EQ sound adjustment provides multiple preset sound modes for different music types and usage scenarios. IPX4 waterproof design adapts to various outdoor environments.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The BT508 uses professional-grade audio components and high-performance battery system, ensuring long-term high-quality operation and excellent sound quality performance.

Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection and more. Features guitar input and microphone input, ideal choice for outdoor gatherings and performances.

metadata.title: Product Details - PT9818B Portable Party Speaker
metadata.description: PT9818B Dual 8-inch Portable Party Speaker with built-in rechargeable battery, 100W power output, supports Bluetooth/USB/FM radio
metadata.keywords: portable speaker,party speaker,bluetooth speaker,outdoor speaker,dual 8 inch

introduction.title: Product Introduction
paragraphs: The PT9818B is a portable party speaker designed specifically for outdoor gatherings and mobile performances. The dual 8-inch speaker configuration provides 100W powerful output, delivering impressive audio performance whether for outdoor parties or small performances.

Built-in 12V/5A rechargeable battery frees you from power cord constraints, allowing you to enjoy music anytime, anywhere. Supports Bluetooth wireless connection, USB playback, FM radio, and other audio input methods. TWS True Wireless Stereo technology can interconnect two speakers to create a more powerful stereo system. Features guitar input and microphone input (supports wired/wireless microphones), suitable for various performance and karaoke scenarios. LED display intuitively shows working status, and remote control operation is more convenient.

coreAdvantages.title: Core Advantages
coreAdvantages.description: The PT9818B integrates portable design with powerful performance, making it the perfect companion for outdoor entertainment and mobile performances.

items.title: Portable Design
items.description: Built-in 12V/5A large-capacity rechargeable battery frees you from power cord constraints, allowing you to enjoy music anytime, anywhere. Compact body design is convenient for carrying and moving, suitable for outdoor gatherings, picnics, camping, and various other scenarios.

items.title: Powerful Audio Performance
items.description: Dual 8-inch large-diameter speaker configuration with 100W powerful output delivers impressive audio performance. Whether low frequencies or mid-high frequencies, they can be clearly presented to meet the playback needs of various music styles.

items.title: Multi-functional Entertainment
items.description: Supports Bluetooth, USB, FM radio, TWS interconnection, and more. Features guitar input and microphone input, supports wired/wireless microphones (optional), suitable for karaoke, performances, and various entertainment scenarios. LED display and remote control make operation more convenient.

technicalSpecs.title: Technical Specifications
technicalSpecs.description: The PT9818B uses high-quality audio components and a stable battery system to ensure long-term stable operation and excellent sound performance.
